datafield.subfield: Universität, Fakultät für Sprache und Geschichte
University, Faculty of Language and History Geography
Talatpaşa Mahallesi, İmrahor Cad., Sadabad Mevkii No:31
Süleymaniye, Ayşe Kadın Hamamı Sk. No:27
Please contact the publishing house Pan Yayıncılık with your enquiries.
Private collection of Ali Rifat Çağatay
Owner of the collection is the grandson Alp Altıner of Ali Rifat Çağatay.
